_publications._publicationTitle: Phase I trial and pharmacokinetic study of sorafenib in children with neurofibromatosis type I and plexiform neurofibromas.

_contextSnippet: Patient 1 developed grade 3 pain... Patient 6 developed dose-limiting grade 3 rash... she developed dose-limiting grade 4 mood alteration, suicidal ideation
resourceName: NCI Common Terminology Criteria for Adverse Events (CTCAE) v3.0
details: Successfully graded dose-limiting toxicities including grade 3 tumor pain, grade 3 rash, and grade 4 mood alteration with suicidal ideation
